nodes.label: P2.1 synth — dead-unit and goodness-separation diagnostics across the grid
nodes.rationale: Dead units rise for most cells by layer 8 (batchBN+lin and group+lin reach ~0.5) except layer+lin/onlineBN+lin which stay lower; goodness separation for batchBN+lin (ref) climbs to ~140 by layer 7 -- batch statistics again inflate raw separation far beyond the per-sample cells on synth too.
